channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Guide to summer hiking in the Ottawa region with practical tips and recommended trails
item.description: This article provides a practical guide for people interested in exploring hiking opportunities in the Ottawa region during the summer season. It highlights both safety and enjoyment considerations fo...

item.title: Kolumnista kinuwestiyon ang naging reaksyon ng mga senador matapos ang insidente ng pamamaril sa Senado
item.description: Tinalakay sa opinion column ni Chito de la Vega ang naging magulong pangyayari sa Senado matapos ang insidente ng pamamaril noong Mayo 13, 2026. Inilarawan niya ang mga sumunod na eksena bilang parang...

item.title: Victorian Painter Richard Ansdell Remembered for His Animal and Highland Scenes
item.description: Richard Ansdell (1815–1885) was an important British painter of the Victorian period who became widely recognized for his detailed depictions of animals, sporting life, and rural landscapes. Born in L...

item.title: BJP accuses Rahul Gandhi of attempting to destabilise Modi government through alleged inflammatory remarks
item.description: The Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) on Sunday levelled serious allegations against Congress leader Rahul Gandhi, accusing him of attempting to destabilise the Narendra Modi-led central government by alle...

item.title: Rare LIFE Magazine Photos Capture Lucille Ball and Vivian Vance Performing in a 1962 Episode of The Lucy Show
item.description: The article from Vintage Everyday revisits a memorable episode of the classic television series “The Lucy Show” titled “Chris’s New Year’s Eve Party,” which originally aired on CBS on December 31, 196...

item.title: Police launch manhunt after two tourists killed in Kruger National Park
item.description: Limpopo police have launched a major manhunt following the killing of two tourists in the Kruger National Park. The victims, a 71-year-old man and an unidentified woman, were discovered dead near Cros...

item.title: CTI Career Fair Links Tanzanian Youth to Employment and Business Opportunities
item.description: The Confederation of Tanzanian Industries (CTI) has organised a Career Fair aimed at linking young job seekers with employment and business opportunities across different sectors in Tanzania. The init...

item.title: Tom Hardy reportedly stepping away from MobLand as filming delays clash with planned acting break
item.description: A report published by the Daily Mail claims that actor Tom Hardy is unlikely to return for a future season of the Paramount+ crime drama MobLand following disagreements over production schedules and a...

item.title: NRL Round 12: Cowboys host Rabbitohs at Queensland Country Bank Stadium
item.description: The article covers the Round 12 clash in the 2026 NRL Premiership between the North Queensland Cowboys and the South Sydney Rabbitohs, played at Queensland Country Bank Stadium in Townsville. The matc...

item.title: Writer argues that resisting AI dependence helps preserve human thinking and autonomy
item.description: Writer and former software developer Wendy Liu reflects on her long-standing resistance to artificial intelligence tools, arguing that the struggle involved in learning, coding and writing is essentia...

item.title: Kaze says Kaizer Chiefs future depends on management after third-place finish
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs co-coach Cedric Kaze has indicated that the future of the current coaching setup will be determined by club management following the conclusion of the season. Speaking after Chiefs wrapp...

item.title: SARS challenges Information Regulator order to disclose Jacob Zuma tax records
item.description: The South African Revenue Service (SARS) has taken legal steps to block the release of former president Jacob Zuma’s tax records, arguing that an enforcement notice issued by the Information Regulator...

item.title: Quetta shuttle train blast kills 14, multiple injured in Balochistan attack
item.description: At least 14 people were killed and several others injured when an explosion targeted a shuttle train in Quetta on Sunday morning, according to the Balochistan government. The train was reportedly trav...

item.title: Son of Former Matungu MP Dies After Night Attack in Kisumu
item.description: Hannington Were, the 39-year-old son of former Matungu MP David Aoko Were, was killed during a night attack in Kisumu on Saturday, May 23. According to the former legislator, Hannington had left home ...

item.title: Gabriel Pidomson Emerges ADC Governorship Candidate in Rivers State After Primary Election
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) has picked Gabriel Pidomson as its governorship candidate for Rivers State after he won the party primary election held across the 23 local government areas of th...

item.title: Daniela Bianchi and Her Legacy as a 1960s European Cinema Icon
item.description: Daniela Bianchi, born in 1942 in Rome, Italy, is an Italian actress widely recognized for her role as Tatiana Romanova in the 1963 James Bond film “From Russia with Love.” Her performance as the Sovie...

item.title: Norman Seeff’s 1969 Portrait Session with Patti Smith in New York
item.description: In 1969, Patti Smith was still an emerging figure within New York’s underground art and literary circles, far from the international recognition she would later achieve as a pioneering musician and cu...

item.title: US announces India’s planned $500 billion goods purchase over five years amid trade talks
item.description: The United States Secretary of State Marco Rubio has stated that India has committed to purchasing around $500 billion worth of American goods over the next five years. He made this announcement after...

item.title: Reopened Train des Merveilles railway connects Nice with the Southern French Alps
item.description: The article describes the reopening of the Train des Merveilles (Train of Wonders), a scenic railway line in southeastern France that links the glamorous Côte d’Azur with the rugged landscapes of the ...

item.title: Study highlights Shock Index tool for early detection of life-threatening childbirth complications
item.description: The article explains the major global challenge of maternal deaths caused by postpartum haemorrhage and maternal sepsis, conditions that remain especially severe in low- and middle-income countries, i...
